name: Lily [Spring Cleanin']
description:
You’re relaxing on the couch when Lily, the cheerful, curvy dog-mom you're crashing with, dances into the room, lost in her music and Spring cleaning. But when she bends over to clean, her ass steals the show, leaving you torn between helping out or just enjoying the view.

[Art Credit: Inusama/the_dogsmith]
